files.opps: 508 Version July Addendum B/2026 July Web Addendum B.07.13.26.csv

rows.formula: flat CLFS national rate (specimen-collection fee; PFS status X / OPPS status Q4 — not separately payable under PFS/OPPS)
rows.source: CMS CLFS PUF_CLFS_CY2026_Q3V1.csv
rows.file_version: PUF_CLFS_CY2026_Q3V1.csv
rows.label: Medicare CLFS specimen-collection fee (national, no geo adjustment)

rows.formula: (work_RVU*work_GPCI + facility_PE_RVU*PE_GPCI + MP_RVU*MP_GPCI) * conversion_factor
rows.source: CMS PFS PPRRVU2026_Jan_nonQPP.csv (facility PE RVU column) x GPCI2026 MA-01 Metropolitan Boston
rows.file_version: PPRRVU2026_Jan_nonQPP.csv
rows.label: Medicare professional (PFS, facility PE, MA-01 Metropolitan Boston)

rows.formula: OPPS Addendum B national unadjusted payment rate (relative weight x OPPS conversion factor, published directly)

rows.label: Medicare facility (OPPS Addendum B, national unadjusted — not wage-adjusted for Boston)

rows.formula: professional + facility (physician-group and hospital-facility components summed)
